_provenance: Example subs file for the `software-craft` vault. A subs file records the token substitutions a vault's CLAUDE.md was instantiated with, so check-conformance.py can re-derive the expected template output and diff it against the live CLAUDE.md. The token values below are the canonical inputs; this `_provenance` field is free-form notes (ignored by the tool) where you record per-vault ratification decisions and accepted divergences. `software-craft` is an exec-split vault: `coding-handoff` is its execution-session record type, rolling into `projects/` entity pages.
